name: llm_after_retry
description: Forces the validator-rejection → retry → accept path so source='llm_after_retry' is exercised. Attempt 0 is a status=Compliant proposal whose narrative omits every phrase in validator._AFFIRMING_PHRASES (engine/validator.py:43-60), so classify_narrative returns AMBIGUOUS and the status/narrative-class check at validator.py:343-352 fires STATUS_NARRATIVE_MISMATCH. Orchestrator builds corrective_context and loops; attempt 1 pops a clean affirming proposal which passes the validator on first try. assessor.py:1161 sets source='llm' when attempt_no==0 and 'llm_after_retry' otherwise — the case pins the boundary at attempt_no==1. Existing compliant_doc_citation accepts source='llm' OR 'llm_after_retry'; this case forces the retry branch so a regression that silently never retries (e.g. _build_corrective_context returning None and breaking the loop) is caught directly.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization identifies and selects the following types of information system accounts to support organizational missions/business functions.
ccis_row.procedures: Examine the account management plan and confirm account types are enumerated.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- USD00099999 Example System Account Management Plan Rev B — enumerates privileged, service, and standard user account types and the approval workflow for each.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Per USD00099999, all required account types are present.

Examined USD00099999 Example System Account Management Plan Rev B; confirmed via section 3 that privileged, service, and standard account types are documented in the plan with approval workflows for each.
